headline: Unusual Options Activity Suggests the Smart Money Is Bullish About Rio Tinto Stock Despite Glencore Deal Collapse
summary: Rio Tinto’s options volume was 17 times its 30-day average on Thursday. At the same time, the big news was the company’s announcement that it was ending its pursuit of Glencore. While the news might seem disappointing, its unusual options activity suggests otherwise.

headline: United CEO Is Worried About Fuel Prices. What It Means for Airfares.
summary: Airline stocks have taken a hammering this week–travelers’ wallets could be next.  Jet fuel prices have surged as the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed.  U.S. jet fuel prices have climbed to around $150 a barrel, from $105 last week, according to OPIS data.

raw.headline: United CEO Is Worried About Fuel Prices. What It Means for Airfares.
